description: 32 x 32-bit general purpose register file (x0 hardwired to 0)
functionality: Implements the 32 general-purpose integer registers specified by RV32I. Register x0 is hardwired to zero: reads always return 0, writes to x0 are ignored. Two asynchronous read ports provide rs1_data and rs2_data combinationally from the address on rs1_addr/rs2_addr. The synchronous write port writes wdata to the register at waddr on the rising edge of clk when we is high (and waddr != 0). On reset, all registers (except x0) are cleared to zero.
